title: UV Client
description: This is a version of Ultra Vanilla with only client side mods, still elevating the game without completely changing it.
body:
Ultra Vanilla Client adds mods meant to make your client more functional than others. This includes many performance mods to make sure you can play, but also quality of life things like dynamic lights, and even improved pages like a better stats screen.

Links:

https://www.canva.com/](https://www.canva.com/

https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/
